Waterproof surface made from non-GMO sugarcane. 100% Vegan. No glues or adhesives, no polyurethane foam, passes flame standards without fire retardants or chemical additives.100-NIGHT TRIAL | LIFETIME WARRANTY | FREE RETURNS
